domain-availability.description: Domain availability checker used by Brand Verbal Identity. Install via 'uvx --from imprvhub/mcp-domain-availability domain-mcp'. Free, no API key required. Covers 50+ TLDs. Used for bulk availability checks on naming shortlists.

UNSPLASH_ACCESS_KEY.description: Unsplash free API key (demo tier OK). Used by Brand Visual System for mood imagery refs. Register at unsplash.com/developers. 50 req/h on demo tier (far more than a Brand run needs). Visual gracefully degrades if missing/down — flag mood_imagery_skipped: true.
